LAW AND MOTION 301, THE LAW FIRM OF HERSH & HERSH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF JOHN NAVAS IS GRANTED BY THE COURT ON THE CONDITION THAT MR. BOYLE APPEAR AT THE HEARING ON THURSDAY FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE IN DEPT. 206 AND TO DELIVER THE ENTIRE FILE TO MR. JOHN NAVAS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-22-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MARK LIPTON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOSEPH BOYLE APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED MR. BOYLE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL ON 7/19/10 ON THE CONDITION THAT HE WILL BE PRESENT FOR THIS HEARING. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/27/10 IS CONTINUED TO 12/6/10 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL DATES TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT IS TO SERVE NOTICE AND TIME OF PLACE OF TRIAL TO PLAINTIFF'S FORMER COUNSEL AND TO SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH BOYLE OF THE HERSH & HERSH LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 441-5544 MOVING PARTY;
JOHN NAVAS, PLAINTIFF ALSO APPEARING IN COURT.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS HEARD TWICE. THE MATTER WAS HEARD IN CAMERA ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:00 A.M. THE MATTER WAS HEARD ON THE PUBLIC RECORD AT 10:15 A.M. THE LAW FIRM OF HERSH & HERSH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF JOHN NAVAS IS GRANTED BY THE COURT ON THE CONDITION THAT MR. BOYLE APPEAR AT THE HEARING ON THURSDAY FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE IN DEPT. 206 AND TO DELIVER THE ENTIRE FILE TO MR. JOHN NAVAS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
